description: Fusion Orchestration System — MOA Judge, Local/Cloud Hybrid, Premortem Diagnostics

skills.name: fusion-orchestrator
skills.description: Routes queries through user-assigned or auto-discovered distinct reference models and synthesizes via Judge arbitration. Supports role-pinned, local-only, cloud-only, and hybrid modes.

skills.name: fusion-judge
skills.description: Rubric-based Judge role for evaluating and synthesizing reference model outputs. High-calibration, structured scoring.

skills.name: fusion-eval
skills.description: Test harness for calibrating the fusion pipeline. Runs benchmark scenarios and reports drift, consistency, and quality metrics.

skills.name: hermes-tweet
skills.description: Guides Hermes Agent through Hermes Tweet for X/Twitter search, monitoring, publishing, and account-safe action gates through Xquik.
